cases.prompt: what's 17 times 23? just tell me the number
cases.note: The dock can't do mental math reliably; a good model calls compute() rather than guessing. Discriminates tool-use for reasoning vs hallucinated arithmetic.

cases.prompt: pick a random number from 1 to 6, and if it's bigger than 3, say you win, otherwise say try again
cases.note: Compute as a control-flow tool (random + compare). Weak models narrate a number they made up; good ones call compute and branch on the real result.

cases.prompt: roughly how many legs does a spider have?
cases.note: Trivia it just KNOWS — calling compute here would be over-eager. Good model answers directly.
